title: Alberta Separatist Group's Controversial Voter ID App Has Links to US Ambassador, MAGA Influencers and Wealthy Michigan Republicans
notes: Advocacy non-profit (self-describes covering right-wing extremism) — label lean in UI; quotes are on-record. Foreign-influence angle: Centurion's app modelled on/linked to Michigan-based 10xVotes; US Ambassador Hoekstra previously promoted 10xVotes (denies involvement in Alberta use). Supports STAGED cluster EVT-NEW-centurion-foreign, not yet an EVT record.
